evidence.snippet: AVSS's compliant drone parachute recovery systems and flight termination systems enable your drone operations and end users to legally fly over populated areas.

Founded in 2017, AVSS – Aerial Vehicle Safety Solutions Inc. (AVSS) is a Canadian aerospace company commercializing drone technology for Urban Air Mobility. AVSS’s current products are ASTM F3322 drone parachute recovery systems for commercial drones, independent flight termination systems, and precision-guided delivery systems for last-mile delivery.

items.notes: Drone parachute recovery systems (PRS) are the core product line for multiple DJI platforms

evidence.snippet: Founded in 2017, AVSS – Aerial Vehicle Safety Solutions Inc. (AVSS) is a Canadian aerospace company commercializing drone technology for Urban Air Mobility. AVSS’s current products are ASTM F3322 drone parachute recovery systems for commercial drones, independent flight termination systems, and precision-guided delivery systems for last-mile delivery.

The PRS-M4S is a simple plug-and-play design. The initial launch of the PRS-M4S includes a Parachute Recovery System (PRS), a Flight Termination System (FTS), an Automatic Triggering System (ATS), a Manual Triggering Device (MTD), and relevant regulatory documentation.

items.notes: Independent flight termination systems (FTS) bundled into PRS product line

evidence.snippet: In 2020, AVSS began to expand its product offerings with guided and unguided delivery systems for dual-use customers. These new products have been sold to commercial and government clients.
[Full Stack Hardware and Software. Platform Agnostic.](https://www.avss.co/delivery-systems/ "Full Stack Hardware and Software. Platform Agnostic.")

items.notes: Ground control software for delivery systems allows users to preplan and automate missions

Founded in 2017, AVSS – Aerial Vehicle Safety Solutions Inc. (AVSS) is a Canadian aerospace company commercializing drone technology for Urban Air Mobility. AVSS’s current products are ASTM F3322 drone parachute recovery systems for commercial drones, independent flight termination systems, and precision-guided delivery systems for last-mile delivery.

Founded in 2017, AVSS – Aerial Vehicle Safety Solutions Inc. (AVSS) is a Canadian aerospace company commercializing drone technology for Urban Air Mobility. AVSS’s current products are ASTM F3322 drone parachute recovery systems for commercial drones, independent flight termination systems, and precision-guided delivery systems for last-mile delivery.

AVSS's compliant drone parachute recovery systems and flight termination systems enable your drone operations and end users to legally fly over populated areas.
AVSS's guided and unguided delivery systems enable the critical resupply of strategic goods to hard-to-reach locations from autonomous and crewed aircraft.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Makes PRS, FTS, and guided delivery systems that attach to or deploy from existing (primarily DJI) drone platforms; distributes through 50+ authorized dealers and sells direct to drone manufacturers

evidence.snippet: [AVSS – Aerial Vehicle Safety Solutions (AVSS)](https://www.avss.co/) is proud to announce that they have completed the third-party testing requirements for the newly released ASTM F3322-24a with their PRS-M30, designed for the [DJI M30 Series](https://enterprise.dji.com/matrice-30).

Drone Parachute Recovery System for DJI M350 RTK
In 2020, AVSS began to expand its product offerings with guided and unguided delivery systems for dual-use customers. These new products have been sold to commercial and government clients.

items.name: Guided Delivery Systems
items.product_type: autonomously guided resupply hardware for air-dropped delivery

evidence.snippet: In 2020, AVSS began to expand its product offerings with guided and unguided delivery systems for dual-use customers. These new products have been sold to commercial and government clients.

After completing the compliance testing on Friday, March 28th, AVSS turned around and shipped the first batch of parachutes to end users and dealers in North America and Europe on the same day.
AVSS is now taking new orders for their PRS-M30, which will be delivered to customers throughout Q2, 2025.

readiness.notes: Active production with 50+ authorized dealer network worldwide; ships same-day after compliance milestones

tagline: Canadian supplier of ASTM F3322- and EASA MOC 2511-compliant parachute recovery systems for DJI enterprise platforms (M200–M350 series, Mavic 3E, docked systems), plus guided delivery hardware and avalanche-mitigation projectiles. Production-ready across multiple SKUs. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of regulatory compliance is strong for European markets, limited for U.S. federal procurement pathways.
